exemplar.title: In The World's Wife, how does Carol Ann Duffy explore the agency of female characters in their transformation and struggle against patriarchal oppression?

detailedExemplarData.title: In The World's Wife, how does Carol Ann Duffy explore the agency of female characters in their transformation and struggle against patriarchal oppression?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Demonstrates an excellent grasp of the collectionâs central feminist concerns and sustains interpretation across all three poems
Quotations are wellâchosen and generally embedded smoothly to support analytical points
Contextualization of Carol Ann Duffyâs work is informed and enhances the argumentâs persuasiveness
weaknesses: Occasional drift into plot summary rather than analysis of implications
Works Cited entries lack a consistent style and some citations are incomplete
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although there are minor lapses into summary and inconsistent citation formatting, the essay overall presents a persuasive and sustained interpretation of the guiding question. References are frequent, relevant and effectively support nuanced readings of female agency and patriarchy. This level of sustained, persuasive engagement merits the top band for Knowledge, Understanding and Interpretation.

strengths: Appropriate analysis of textual features such as enjambment, sibilance and extended metaphor linked to thematic concerns
At times offers insightful evaluation (e.g., the effect of sibilance in Thetis)
Moves beyond mere description to make clear connections between devices and meaning
weaknesses: Analysis sometimes remains at the level of naming devices without fully probing deeper implications
Occasional lapses back into narrative retelling rather than sustained evaluation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay consistently provides appropriate and at times insightful analysis of poetic techniques, linking them to themes of female autonomy. However, insight is not sustained throughout, and some discussions stop at description. This aligns with Band 4 for Analysis and Evaluation.

strengths: Effectively organized with a clear thesis, logical progression of paragraphs and cohesive line of inquiry
Supporting examples are well integrated into sentences and paragraphs
Conclusion ties back to the guiding question and synthesizes main arguments
weaknesses: A few transitions between poems are abrupt
Some topic sentences could be sharpened for greater clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The structure is highly effective: the introduction sets up a focused argument, body paragraphs develop it coherently with integrated evidence, and the conclusion reinforces the line of inquiry. Minor transitional lapses do not undermine the overall cohesion. This meets the descriptor for Band 5 in Focus, Organization and Development.

strengths: Language is clear and mostly fluent, with varied vocabulary and generally accurate grammar
Register and style are consistently appropriate to an academic literary essay
Terminology is used correctly in most instances
weaknesses: Occasional grammar lapses (comma splices, missing words) do not impede meaning but prevent high precision
Citation and formatting inconsistencies detract from polish
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The candidate demonstrates good control of language: clarity, appropriate register and sentence variety are consistently maintained. However, occasional slips in grammar and citation conventions prevent the very high degree of accuracy required for Band 5. The performance aligns with Band 4 for Language.

strandSelections.reasoning: Supporting quotations are **usually integrated grammatically into sentences** and analysed within the same paragraph. Minor lapses such as very long block quotations or detached parenthetical references occur, but the majority of evidence is woven into the prose effectively, corresponding to Band 4 for integration.

The student displays **solid, consistently accurate knowledge of the collectionâs central concerns** (female agency, transformation, patriarchy) and links these to three poems with clear awareness of context and point of view. Interpretation is sustainedâeach poem is connected back to the guiding questionâyet the discussion occasionally drifts into plot summary or broad feminist assertions that are not fully nuanced.  Consequently, the work fits the descriptor of âgood knowledge and understanding with sustained interpretation,â but falls short of the âpersuasive, excellentâ standard required for Band 5.

The essay follows a clear introductory thesis, three-poem structure and conclusion, with **logical paragraphing and connective phrases that maintain a mostly cohesive line of inquiry**. While some transitions are abrupt and a few ideas could be more fully developed, overall organization is purposeful and supports the argument, aligning with the âwell organized and mostly cohesiveâ descriptor of Band 4.

Quotations are **frequent, relevant, and usually embedded smoothly** (e.g. precise line references from each poem). They are clearly used to illustrate analytical points rather than decorate the essay. A few citations are paraphrased secondary commentary instead of textual evidence, and occasional over-lengthy quotations are left under-analysed, so support is effective rather than exemplary, placing the work securely in Band 4.

The student maintains an **appropriately formal academic register** and consistently analytical style. Occasional informal phrases (âOn the other hand,â âoverall have a negative connotationâ) and citation inconsistencies prevent the style from being fully polished and âeffective,â but it remains consistently appropriate, meriting Band 4.

Language is **clear and mostly fluent**, with varied vocabulary and generally accurate grammar. Occasional slips (âcatalysis,â missing words, comma splices) do not impede communication. This meets the âgood accuracyâ descriptor but lacks the near-perfect precision expected for Band 5.

The essay moves beyond description by identifying devices such as extended metaphor, enjambment and sibilance and links them to female autonomy; this shows **generally appropriate analysis and some evaluation**. However, commentary often remains surface-level (e.g. labelling techniques without probing their deeper implications) and occasionally slides back into narrative retelling. Insight is intermittent rather than sustained, matching Band 3.

annotations.comment: Your reference to enjambment would benefit from quoting the exact line break to show how it alters pace or meaning.
Overall Works Cited entries vary between MLA, blog style, and incomplete formats; adopt a single, recognized style for consistency.
Avoid ending clauses with prepositions (âaffair withâ); consider rephrasing to maintain formal academic tone.
Repetitive use of âsheâ in phrases like âshe is in control of how she presents herselfâ weakens style; vary sentence subjects.
The student should transform this prompt into a clear, concise thesis early in the essay to guide the readerâs line of inquiry.
Effective contextualization of Duffyâs collection offers a solid foundation for the argument, demonstrating informed understanding of the workâs feminist concerns.
Your thesis (âDuffy explores how women take agencyâ¦â) is clear but could be more precise by naming the specific poems you will analyze.
Analysis often lists literary devices without fully exploring their deeper implications; probe how each device shapes the readerâs understanding of female agency.
Insightful reading of sibilance here shows how sound reinforces Thetisâs shapeshifting resistance; this level of device-to-theme linkage is strong.
The conclusionâs reference to âongoing struggles women face todayâ is broad; ground it with a specific contemporary example or statistic.
The opening âIn conclusion in The Worldâs Wife Carol Ann Duffy powerfully reexaminesâ uses passive construction; rephrase actively for stronger impact.
The Works Cited header stands out, but entries lack consistent punctuation and ordering; apply a uniform style guide throughout.
Citation â(Doug, et a, 2024)â is not formatted according to IB or MLA conventions; standardize author names and punctuation consistently.
The term âcatalysisâ is misused here; consider replacing it with âcatalystâ to accurately describe the force prompting transformation.
Transition âOn the other handâ feels abrupt between poems; vary your connective language to maintain flow and clarify shifts in argument.
Supporting quotation here is well integrated, allowing analysis to follow directly; continue weaving evidence smoothly into your own sentences.
This topic sentence in the Medusa section is vague; sharpen it to signal your argument about how Duffy reframes Medusaâs villainy.
Phrasing âoverall have a negative connotationâ is informal and imprecise; opt for more academic language like âcarries negative connotations.â
Citation â(D, and Rayan)â has inconsistent comma usage; revise to â(D and Rayan)â or include full author details per style guide.
Relying on a WordPress blog for analysis raises concerns about source credibility; prioritize peer-reviewed or scholarly commentary.
Paragraph opening here shifts from analysis to description without a clear topic sentence; reorganize to distinguish which poem is under discussion.
Website titles should be italicized or underlined per citation conventions; here, the PDF title is not distinguished typographically.
Entry âD, and Rayanâ omits full author names; ensure all authors are listed correctly to uphold academic integrity.
You mention âIn stanza 4â twice in close succession; vary your wording to maintain reader engagement and avoid redundancy.
Extend your analysis of irregular line breaks by explaining how they mirror Medusaâs fractured psyche beyond just naming the device.
Your reading of childbirth imagery is compelling; you could further discuss how this literal and metaphorical âturning inside outâ resonates across Duffyâs feminist themes.
The concluding evaluative claim would gain weight if paired with specific textual examples rather than remaining general.
